stemHtml: Which of the following is part of the 'security restricted area'? (ICAO Annex 17/(EC) No 300/2008)

options.a: The baggage and PAX check-in area.
options.b: The airside area, extending 5 NM away from the airport.
options.c: The airside catering and aircraft cleaning premises.
options.d: The airport buildings area, where PAX have access.
